steps.title: Set up the equation with the given profit
steps.content:
We want to find how many buttons must be sold to earn a profit of \$930. Set $p(x) = 930$ in the given function:
$$6x - 270 = 930$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 270 to both sides:
$$6x = 1200$$
Divide both sides by 6:
$$x = 200$$
The debate club must sell 200 buttons to earn the desired profit.
